allow: Bash(ls /c/Windows/Fonts/ 2>/dev/null | grep -i noor; ls "/c/Users/ABR ALSHARQ/AppData/Local/Microsoft/Windows/Fonts/" 2>/dev/null | grep -i noor)

PowerShell(\(Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows NT\\CurrentVersion\\Fonts'\).PSObject.Properties | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'noor' } | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Name\) = $\($_.Value\)" }; \(Get-ItemProperty 'HKCU:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows NT\\CurrentVersion\\Fonts' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).PSObject.Properties | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'noor' } | ForEach-Object { "USER: $\($_.Name\) = $\($_.Value\)" })
Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-Process | Where-Object {$_.Path -like '\\''*dist*'\\''} | Select-Object Name, Id | Format-Table')
Bash(python -m PyInstaller run_app.py --name "سجلات النهج" --onefile --windowed --icon assets/logo.ico --add-data "assets;assets" --add-data "ui/theme.qss;ui" --noconfirm --log-level ERROR)
Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-Process | Where-Object {$_.Path -like '\\''*Desktop*النهج*'\\'' -or $_.Path -like '\\''*Desktop*.exe'\\''} | Select-Object Id, StartTime, Path | Format-List')

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-Process | Where-Object {$_.MainWindowTitle -like '\\''*النهج*'\\'' -or $_.MainWindowTitle -like '\\''*Nhj*'\\'' -or $_.MainWindowTitle -like '\\''*سجل*'\\''} | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, MainWindowTitle | Format-List')
Bash(python make_release.py "تسريع الفتح: شاشة بداية فورية + تأجيل تحميل المكتبات الثقيلة")
Bash(python -c "import yaml, sys; yaml.safe_load\(open\('.github/workflows/release.yml', encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('صيغة YAML صحيحة'\)")

PowerShell(try { $dm = New-Object -ComObject WIA.DeviceManager; $found=$false; foreach \($d in $dm.DeviceInfos\) { if \($d.Type -eq 1\) { $found=$true; $name=\($d.Properties | Where-Object {$_.Name -eq 'Name'}\).Value; Write-Output "SCANNER: $name  [ID: $\($d.DeviceID\)]" } }; if \(-not $found\) { Write-Output "لا يوجد سكنر ظاهر لـ WIA حالياً \(قد يكون مطفأً أو غير متصل الآن\)" } } catch { Write-Output "خطأ WIA: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
